Assault.effect: Boon on damage vs Shields/Heavy Armor.
On Boon hit, attacker chooses enemy's Injury Resistance stat.
Boon on hit if user Defended/Yielded last turn.

Coercion.effect: Solid Hit forces Bane on target's next Social/Resolve action.
Deals minor chip CMP damage even on a Miss.
Boon on Coercion rolls vs already Broken/Shaken targets.

Ballistics.effect: Removes Bane for firing within 5ft of enemies.
Spend 1 FP for Boon on Critical Injury rolls.
On hit, target rolls vs Staggered status.

Suppression.effect: Declare hex; enemy entering must roll CMP or stop moving.
Enemies in range suffer Bane on Sequence actions.
Target has Bane on Offense if they don't move out of LoS.

Fortify.effect: Immune to Prone/Forced Move; Boon vs Disarm.
Successful defense converts Solid Hit into a Graze.
Winning a Clash grants Boon on next Assault action.

Resolve.effect: Boon on Social defense rolls while at Max CMP.
Use Logic for Horrifying Sight defense instead of Willpower.
Critical Success on Defense deals 1d4 CMP damage to attacker.

Operations.effect: Boon on rolls to destroy cover or create Difficult Terrain.
Use environment to gain Boon on next Fortify action.
Spend 1 SP to give ally shield/cover +1 Durability.

Tactics.effect: Ally may swap their Lead/Trail stats immediately for free.
If enemy is Staggered, user may move turn order to act next.
If top of turn order, all allies gain +5ft Move Speed.

Stabilize.effect: Stitch wound as Move Action (Bane) instead of Main.
Boon on rolls to remove Bleeding or Poison status.
Only skill capable of removing Severe Injury scars.

Rally.effect: Spend 1 FP for Boon to resist Mental Fractures.
Ignore Bane penalty for low CMP (<50%) for 1 turn.
Can perform Rally action on allies at range (15ft).

Mobility.effect: Move 15ft in straight line for Boon on next Assault.
No Free Attacks provoked when moving adjacent to enemies.
Moving 2 turns in a row increases SPD by +10ft.

Bravery.effect: Boon on Resolve rolls while adjacent to an enemy.
Allies moving toward the user gain +5ft Move Speed.
Retreat without losing Sequence on next round.
